name: Trophy Hunters Walkthrough
description: Step-by-step walkthrough. Play by the rulebook.

steps.detail: Visit profile or complete onboarding. Your user_id and user_index are set.
Go to Trophies page. See trophy list, Star Map, Comm. Psychology, Rulebook, Compendium.
Open Compendium → V1 Core Rules. Understand user_id, user_index, profiles.
Trophies → Star Map tab. Click View Star Map. See 7 nearest stars.
Click Run Verification. Electric Magnet special.
Click Run DNA Test. Electric Magnet special.
Compendium → V2 or Trophies → Rulebook. See 19 spells in 5 sectors.
Star Map, Proxima B Beacon, Sirius B Pulse, Earth B Shield. Cost 10–30.
Use specials, complete activities. Award game_points via unified points.
Trophies → Comm. Psychology tab. See 25 theories.
Click Study on Agenda-Setting or any locked theory.
Compendium → Part I pages 1–10. Each page awards compendium_points.
Profile or Points page. xp_points, game_points, communication_psychology_points, compendium_points.
Read all rulebook pages. Each awards points.
Agents load /api/rulebooks/agent-context. You play by the rulebook.

phases.name: Stories: Time Reversal, Medieval, Power Combos

steps.detail: Trophies -> Stories. Read Winter Wedding (1017) — setting, roles, conflicts, NPCs, twist.
Shop -> Stories: Winter Wedding Story Unlock or Medieval Campaign Pack. Trophies: Winter Wedding, Time Reversal, Power Combo.
Rulebook V2: Medieval and Time Reversal sectors. Power combos: Contract Seal + Jarl's Fury, etc.
